title: Student Grade Tracker
description: A web-based student grade management system where faculty can record, update, and publish grades for each course. Students can view their academic performance, GPA calculation, course-wise grade breakdown, and receive automated notifications for grade updates and attendance warnings.

title: Academic Performance Dashboard
description: An online platform for tracking and monitoring student academic results across all enrolled courses. Lecturers can enter and manage marks, students can check their GPA, subject-wise scores, and progress reports, with automated alerts sent for low attendance or failing grades.

title: Smart Campus Attendance Tracker
description: An IoT-integrated check-in system using QR codes and RFID sensors for automated staff and visitor presence logging across campus buildings. Features a real-time occupancy dashboard, automated absence alerts via SMS, door access control integration, and a web admin panel for facility managers to monitor building usage and generate occupancy reports.

title: E-Commerce Marketplace for Local Artisans
description: A mobile-first ecommerce marketplace connecting Sri Lankan artisans with buyers. Includes product listings, secure payment gateway integration, delivery tracking, seller analytics dashboard, buyer reviews, and a recommendation engine based on purchase history.

title: AI-Powered Career Path Advisor
description: A machine learning recommendation engine that analyzes a user profile — including skills, interests, work experience, and personality assessments — to suggest personalized career paths and relevant online certifications. Uses collaborative filtering and NLP to match users with industry mentors, generate skill gap reports, and deliver weekly AI-curated content feeds based on career goals.

title: Real-Time Food Delivery Tracking App
description: A full-stack food delivery application with restaurant listings, real-time order tracking via WebSockets, driver location maps, payment integration, order history, push notifications, and a restaurant admin panel for menu and inventory management.
